rulings.Case Title: ARJUN DHINGRA VS. COUNTRYWIDE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 6, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant, no oppositon, response to be filed forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINNA XIU LING ZHAO, BY THEO HONNIBALL et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 6, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANTs RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend as to first and second causes of action, which were not amended as ordered re first demurrer. Sustain without leave to amend as to fourth cause of action re cancellation of Instrument - See Gomes 199 CA 4th, 1149. Sustain with leave to amend as to third, fifth, sixth and seventh causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MONTEJANO ARACELY RODRIGUEZ VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 6, 2012, line 4. Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint. Overrule as to first cause of action and sustain with leave to amend as to remaining causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. EDUARDO ROJAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 6, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs EDUARDO ROJAS, REINA ARGUETA and LUCERO HERRERA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALVACION DIAMANTE VS. LIADI ALMAROOF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 6, 2012, line 3. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. Grant, subject to Proof of Service and opposition. = (501/REQ)
